overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person walk through a misty medieval castle environment. The player approaches a stone fortress along a grassy path, enters through a gothic archway, and emerges into a large courtyard where robed figures gather near tall goal posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle approach path through misty grassy grounds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the castle entrance through the misty morning

entered.detail: tall gothic spires of the castle visible through the morning mist
large grey stone fortress wall running alongside the path
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass with puddles
lush green grass flanking both sides of the path
central clock tower with spire rising above the castle walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty morning approach to a medieval castle. The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt path through tall grass, with a massive stone wall on the right and gothic castle spires visible in the foggy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway entrance with wooden staircase

events.description: entering the covered stone archway from the exterior grounds

agents.ego_description: approaching the castle entrance and walking up the wooden stairs through the stone archway

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the archway entrance facing the courtyard
group of students in dark robes conversing by the wall

entered.detail: large gothic stone archway with pointed ceiling serving as the entrance
wooden plank bridge and stairs leading upward through the archway
rough-hewn stone walls of the interior passage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the castle entrance where robed figures stand near the archway. Passing through the gothic stone archway, the scene becomes enclosed and darker, with wooden stairs leading upward through the stone passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with Quidditch pitch and practicing students

events.description: emerging from the archway into the open courtyard with goal posts visible

agents.ego_description: emerging into the courtyard and panning around to observe the students and the castle grounds

notable_agents.action: student practicing spellcasting with wand raised in the center of the field
group of three students conversing near the courtyard edge

entered.detail: tall stone pillars with horizontal hoops serving as goal posts on the field
massive stone walls surrounding the grassy courtyard on all sides
steep rocky cliffs and forested hills rising behind the castle walls
additional stone towers with pointed roofs along the castle perimeter

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into a vast grassy courtyard surrounded by towering stone walls and mountain cliffs. Several students in robes stand in groups around the field, while one student practices spellcasting in the center near the tall Quidditch goal posts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, atmospheric approach toward a medieval castle that eventually opens into a sprawling, active courtyard. It begins by gliding along a narrow dirt path through tall grass, with a massive stone wall to the right and gothic spires looming through the distant fog. As the camera reaches the castle entrance, it passes by robed figures and moves through a gothic stone archway, where the environment briefly becomes enclosed and darker around wooden stairs. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the passage into a vast grassy courtyard framed by towering stone walls and mountain cliffs. Finally, the view opens across the field to reveal groups of robed students and a lone figure practicing spellcasting near tall goal posts.
